name: Chat agent accepts input and shows a greeting message
description: When the user navigates to the Agent tab, the chat interface shows a greeting message from the AI agent, and the input field is visible and ready to accept text.

planSteps.description: Click the third tab in the bottom dock to open the Agent view
Verify the chat agent interface is visible
Verify a greeting message from the AI agent is visible in the chat area
Verify a text input field is visible at the bottom of the chat for typing messages
Verify a send button (with an arrow-up icon) is visible next to the input field
